title: Welcome to My Personal Blog
content: Welcome to my personal developer blog and portfolio site!  This site is built using the Jekyll Chirpy template and hosted on GitHub Pages. Here, I’ll be sharing my journey, write-ups, research, and projects related to Full-Stack Development, Cybersecurity, Penetration Testing, and emerging tech like Blockchain and Machine Learning.  What to Expect  In future posts, I plan to cover topics including:    Offensive Security & CTFs: Write-ups on exploit development, reverse engineering, and web vulnerability analysis.   Development Insights: Modern backend architecture, scalable microservices, and secure software development practices.   Emerging Tech: Integrations of Large Language Models (LLMs) with decentralized/blockchain networks.   Feel free to browse around, check out my profile on the About page, or download my CV. Thanks for stopping by!
